matching_rule: One base case matches when a promoter or gene-body variant is visible in the current sample. Three additional case families match when the whitelist mean beta, the gene-name-related mean beta, or the all-numeric mean beta resolves to low, medium, or high methylation. Variant prediction rules receive the decoded sample GT, zygosity, ALT dosage, and site REF -> ALT definition; curated allele rules take precedence only when the sample genotype carries the relevant allele dosage.
disclaimer: Predictive theses in this database are literature-guided research summaries derived from the bundled gene interpretation bundle. They are designed for exploratory synthesis in the UI and should not be treated as diagnostic or therapeutic claims.
seeded_markers: TTR Val50Met / V30M model (TTR amyloidogenic variant model)
TTR tetramer-destabilization model (TTR amyloid stability model)
concrete_variant_prediction: The variant observed in this sample suggests a TTR amyloid protein stability review thesis: the individual may carry context relevant to transthyretin tetramer stability, amyloid fibril formation, neuropathy/cardiomyopathy context, and protein-stabilizer therapy biology and Hereditary transthyretin amyloidosis context, Amyloid cardiomyopathy and neuropathy biology. Treat this as pathway triage until the exact allele has external classification and phenotype support.

variant_prediction_rules.prediction: GT-confirmed TTR Val50Met / V30M model dosage suggests this sample carries the TTR prediction context described by the gene-level thesis. The variant observed in this sample suggests a TTR amyloid protein stability review thesis: the individual may carry context relevant to transthyretin tetramer stability, amyloid fibril formation, neuropathy/cardiomyopathy context, and protein-stabilizer therapy biology and Hereditary transthyretin amyloidosis context, Amyloid cardiomyopathy and neuropathy biology. Treat this as pathway triage until the exact allele has external classification and phenotype support. This specific marker is curated as TTR amyloidogenic variant model. TTR Val50Met / V30M model is curated as a TTR marker for Hereditary transthyretin amyloidosis context, Amyloid cardiomyopathy and neuropathy biology. Read it through genotype dosage, phenotype context, and the transthyretin tetramer stability, amyloid fibril formation, neuropathy/cardiomyopathy context, and protein-stabilizer therapy biology pathway rather than as a stand-alone deterministic result.
variant_prediction_rules.sample_change_template: This sample matched TTR Val50Met / V30M model at site definition {change} with GT {gt_raw} decoded as {genotype} ({zygosity}). Anchor the TTR prediction to genotype dosage {allele_dosage} rather than REF -> ALT presence alone. Dosage-specific conclusions should be softened when GT, depth, balance, or genotype quality are uncertain.

methylation_sources.label: Whitelist mean beta
methylation_sources.description: Uses the curated whitelist probes stored in the interpretation database for the current gene.

methylation_sources.label: Gene-name-related mean beta
methylation_sources.description: Uses rows whose gene annotation explicitly names the current gene.

methylation_sources.label: All numeric-row mean beta
methylation_sources.description: Uses every numeric beta value that survived preprocessing for the current sample.

cases.label: Gene variant found
cases.prediction: The variant observed in this sample suggests a TTR amyloid protein stability review thesis: the individual may carry context relevant to transthyretin tetramer stability, amyloid fibril formation, neuropathy/cardiomyopathy context, and protein-stabilizer therapy biology and Hereditary transthyretin amyloidosis context, Amyloid cardiomyopathy and neuropathy biology. Treat this as pathway triage until the exact allele has external classification and phenotype support. An observed TTR variant places this sample in the curated TTR research context. The local TTR bundle is amyloid protein stability review oriented. Interpret markers through exact allele class, zygosity, ancestry, phenotype, and assay context rather than as stand-alone deterministic calls. TTR variants can alter or tag transthyretin tetramer stability, amyloid fibril formation, neuropathy/cardiomyopathy context, and protein-stabilizer therapy biology; effect direction depends on allele class, tissue, dosage, and biological context.

cases.label: Gene variant found + high whitelist mean beta
